parameters.query:
{{ `WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    NULLIF('${String($json.mushroomprocess_product_id ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''")}', '') AS product_id,
    NULLIF('${String($json.storage_location ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''")}', '') AS storage_location
), target_location AS (
  SELECT l.nocopk, l.name
  FROM public.locations l, input i
  WHERE lower(l.name) = lower(i.storage_location)
  ORDER BY l.nocopk
  LIMIT 1
), target_product AS (
  SELECT p.nocopk, p.product_id, COALESCE(p.airtable_id, p.nocopk::text) AS record_id
  FROM public.products p, input i
  WHERE p.product_id = i.product_id
  LIMIT 1
), upd AS (
  UPDATE public.products p
  SET storage_location_id = target_location.nocopk,
      nc_updated_at = now()
  FROM target_location, target_product
  WHERE p.nocopk = target_product.nocopk
  RETURNING p.*
)
SELECT
  (upd.nocopk IS NOT NULL) AS ok,
  CASE
    WHEN target_location.nocopk IS NULL THEN 'missing_target_location'
    WHEN target_product.nocopk IS NULL THEN 'missing_product'
    WHEN upd.nocopk IS NULL THEN 'not_updated'
    ELSE NULL
  END AS error,
  input.product_id AS requested_mushroomprocess_product_id,
  input.storage_location AS requested_storage_location,
  COALESCE(upd.airtable_id, upd.nocopk::text) AS updated_product_record_id,
  upd.product_id AS mushroomprocess_product_id,
  target_location.name AS storage_location
FROM input
LEFT JOIN target_location ON true
LEFT JOIN target_product ON true
LEFT JOIN upd ON true;` }}

{{ `INSERT INTO public.audit_log(actor, action, entity_type, entity_id, details)
VALUES (
  'n8n',
  'product.unshipped',
  'product',
  '${String($('Code - Assert Product UnShipped').first().json.mushroomprocess_product_id || $('Code - Assert Product UnShipped').first().json.updated_product_record_id || 'unknown').replace(/'/g, "''")}',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'product_id', '${String($('Code - Assert Product UnShipped').first().json.mushroomprocess_product_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}',
    'record_id', '${String($('Code - Assert Product UnShipped').first().json.updated_product_record_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}',
    'storage_location', '${String($('Code - Assert Product UnShipped').first().json.storage_location || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}',
    'source', 'signaturegate_pgsql_workflow'
  )
)
RETURNING audit_log_id;` }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, updated_product_record_id: $('Code - Assert Product UnShipped').first().json.updated_product_record_id, mushroomprocess_product_id: $('Code - Assert Product UnShipped').first().json.mushroomprocess_product_id, storage_location: $('Code - Assert Product UnShipped').first().json.storage_location } }}
